macro_narrative_engine.name: Macro Narrative Engine
macro_narrative_engine.description: Explains the hidden structural connections between global macro events and specific consumer equities or sectors in plain English.

params.label: Ticker
params.description: Equity symbol to analyze for macro transmission channels.

legal_footnote_hunter.name: Legal Footnote Hunter
legal_footnote_hunter.description: Bypasses headline EPS metrics to surface hidden operational risks, rising CAC, and unusual revenue recognition policies buried deep in SEC footnotes.

params.label: Ticker
params.description: Equity symbol for SEC Filing deep dive analysis.

params.label: Reporting Quarter
params.description: Filing target quarter (Q1, Q2, Q3, Q4, or Annual 10-K).

whale_tracker.name: Whale Tracker
whale_tracker.description: Translates dense institutional options flow setups, blocks, sweeps, and sweeps sentiment into clear retail-readable positioning reports.

params.label: Ticker
params.description: Target equity symbol for options flow contextualization.

params.label: Min Premium ($)
params.description: Minimum premium threshold to capture institutional blocks.
